mapper.sql: function_type,state, org_id, parent_org_id, enterprise_code, enterprise_name, taxpayer_code, taxpayer_name, org_institution_code, biz_regist_number, registered_capital, establish_time, business_start_time, business_end_time, net_address, remark, linker,phone,email, created_by, created_name, created_date
mapper.update: update base_organization_function set parent_org_id = #{bean.parentOrgId}, enterprise_code = #{bean.enterpriseCode}, enterprise_name = #{bean.enterpriseName}, taxpayer_code = #{bean.taxpayerCode}, taxpayer_name = #{bean.taxpayerName}, org_institution_code = #{bean.orgInstitutionCode}, biz_regist_number = #{bean.bizRegistNumber}, state = #{bean.state}, registered_capital = #{bean.registeredCapital}, establish_time = #{bean.establishTime}, business_start_time = #{bean.bizStartTime}, business_end_time = #{bean.bizEndTime}, net_address = #{bean.netAddress}, remark = #{bean.remark}, linker = #{bean.linker}, phone = #{bean.phone}, email = #{bean.email}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_name=#{bean.modifiedName}, modified_date=#{bean.modifiedDate} where org_id = #{bean.orgId} and function_type=#{bean.funcType}
